title: ClothesPlus Free Version
description: Free version of our plugin ClothesPlus for testing purposes
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5958b404be5fd3a9774b20b53a2397270bf5b05b_0.webp)

Ever dreamt of having a dynamic wardrobe system in your Minecraft server to allow users to customize and build a skin from scratch? Look no further! This plugin allows you to setup your own custom skin overlays, such as skin-colours, eyes, hairs and more, allowing your players to customize themselves in-game after building a base-skin! Tested on 1.19, 1.20, 1.21+

ClothesPlus depends on SkinsRestorer, so please don't forget to download that before you boot up your server with the ClothesPlus jar plugin.


![icon2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c94aa72fd431e2a0087a30ce7e075a6b3879f38a.png)

## **INSTALLATION**
- Download SkinsRestorer, Download ClothesPlus, drag and drop both plugins into your plugin folder and that's it!

Please do check the config.yml of ClothesPlus in order to setup your own Mineskin API key, the one provided inside will be used massively by everyone so the skin change speed will be pretty delayed if you end up trying to use the given API key on your production server. 


There's more information on the config file on how to generate an API key.



-----------------------------------



## **COMMANDS**

Code (Text):

```
/clothes wear {overlayname}
```

Equip a clothing piece or a base-skin overlay!

Code (Text):

```
/clothes unwear {overlayname}
```

Unequip a clothing piece or a base-skin overlay!


-------------------------------------------------------

## **INFO**


This version of the plugin is rather simplified in order to allow you play around with it, please do not decompile it for your own projects without permission.



I'm releasing this free version to allow my community to grow and bring more users to join my team's journey in bringing a fully functional Character Creator in Minecraft!



**What is the difference between Free and Premium version of this plugin?**
The premium version has a full-fledged Character Creator that you can setup on your server, with more detailed configuration system that gives you room to make a more immersive process to your player's skin creating process. It has GUIs, UIs made by me and more!




# **PREMIUM VERSION DOWN**
[Premium Buy Page](https://builtbybit.com/resources/clothesplus-wardrobe-plugin.32757)
### **ClothesPlus – Ultimate Skin Overlays & Wardrobe System**
_Redefine player identity with race presets, live overlays, outfits, & more._

_[2.0.0-BETA]_



Enter a world of unparalleled customization. With the Clothes++ plugin, your Minecraft character becomes a canvas. Transform, tailor, and tweak every detail for an unforgettable in-game experience, allowing your players to create their 'Characters', and 'Personas', from scratch, relying on the preset clothes and skin-bases set up by you. This way, your game aesthetically conforms to what theme you want your server to have.





## **📦 Dependencies**

SkinsRestorer (hard-dependency)
zNPCsPlus (hard-dependency)
ProtocolLib (hard-dependency & bundled async packets) 
LuckPerms (soft-dependency – tokens & perms) 




## **🔨 Installation**

Download ClothesPlus-2.0.0.jar and place it in ```/plugins/```
Ensure the latest versions of SkinsRestorer & ProtocolLib & zNPCsPlus are installed.
Restart the server once – folders & default configs generate automatically.
Edit your config.yml and add your Mineskin API key and then restart your server to allow the plugin to work.

[ You need to add the overlays folder given to you in the .zip file or make your own in order to be able to change skins in-game, the plugin uses a smart 'permission' system for players, if you are not 'op' in your server, it will not show the available overlays in /overlays or /clothes wear {overlayname} ]





## **⌨️ Commands Overview [more info in documentation]**

run ```/clothes help``` for all the command info in-game!

```
/wardrobe	Opens NPC preview & GUI	wardrobeclothes.npc
/overlays	Standalone overlay GUI	wardrobeclothes.use
/outfits	Manage saved outfits	wardrobeclothes.use
/clothes wear	<overlay>[,overlay2...] — add overlays	wardrobeclothes.use
/clothes unwear	<overlay> — remove overlays	wardrobeclothes.use
/clothes save|load|delete	<name>	wardrobeclothes.save|load|delete
/clothes race	<gender> <race>	wardrobeclothes.race
/clothes create | stage | exit	Creator mode controls	wardrobeclothes.create|exit
/clothes add|remove	<player> <tokens>	wardrobeclothes.addtoken|removetoken
/clothes reload	Reload all configs	wardrobeclothes.admin
/clothes reset	Restore vanilla skin	wardrobeclothes.reset
```
